Summary
DescriptionMugello Racing Circuit track map 15 turns.svg
English: Track map of Mugello Circuit in Italy with 15 turns/corners numbered
Date
15 September 2020
Source
This file was derived from: Mugello Racing Circuit track map.svg by Will Pittenger
. Modified to have 15 turn/corner numbers rather than 14
Author
Will Pittenger

Mugello Racing Circuit track map with 15 turns numbered
Italian
